Australia photo/field audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed all 26 imported rows match the Australia men's national soccer team current-squad table; no clean Wikimedia portrait was found for Jacob Italiano, Alessandro Circati, Paul Okon-Engstler, Deni Jurić, or Ante Šuto.
